prompt.label: SQL query generation
prompt.description: Generates SQL query by user description in a natural language.

uses.instructions: Use getCurrentScript function to get the current script text

command.label: Execute prompt
command.description: Execute quary in human language by using AI translator

function.name: List schema names
function.description: Lists schemas available in the current datasource or catalog/database.

parameter.name: catalogName
parameter.description: Name of catalog/database containing schemas. Leave empty if catalog is not known or not supported by server.

function.name: List table names
function.description: Returns a list of tables available in the current datasource. Call it also to verify whether a table exists.

parameter.name: catalogName
parameter.description: Catalog or database name. Leave empty if catalog is not known.

parameter.name: schemaName
parameter.description: Schema name. Short name without preceding catalog name. Leave empty if schema is not known.

function.name: Get table details
function.description: Returns detailed information (columns, constraints, etc) about a specific tables as a DDL. Pass all needed tables in tableNames, do not call it separately for each table. Additional ddl parameters are disabled by default as they may slow down DDL extraction. To ensure that a certain tables exist call tool 'db_listTableNames'.

parameter.name: tableNames
parameter.description: Comma-separated list of fully qualified table names (with preceding catalog or/and schema names)

parameter.name: ddlConstraints
parameter.description: Adds constrains (primary keys, foreign keys) in the DDL. Default: false.

parameter.name: ddlIndexes
parameter.description: Adds indexes and other storage information in the DDL. Default: false.

parameter.name: ddlComments
parameter.description: Adds table and column comments in the DDL. Default: false.

parameter.name: ddlReferences
parameter.description: Adds foreign keys from other referencing tables in the DDL. Default: false.
